chunks.text: Anca Dragan named Head of AI Safety and Alignment at Google DeepMind. EECS Associate Professor Anca Dragan was named Head of AI Safety and Alignment at Google DeepMind. Google DeepMind’s AI Safety and Alignment organization, founded in February, is responsible for developing new safeguards for Gemini models and aligning forthcoming models with human goals and values.
CS Professor Ben Recht was quoted in POLITICO in response to an AI app that creates customized music. The awful AI music that might take over the world.

CZ Biohub: UC Berkeley scientists are taking brain-machine interfaces to a new level with support from Chan Zuckerberg Biohub San Francisco. Mind-blowing science: ‘Star Wars-style’ holograms to communicate with the brain.

The New York Times profiles Covariant, an Emeryville-based AI and robotics company founded by CS Professor Pieter Abbeel and his former students, Peter Chen, Rocky Duan, and Tianhao Zhang. How the A.I. That Drives ChatGPT Will Move Into the Physical World.

EE Professor Emeritus Chenming Hu will be honored at the International House Celebration and Awards Gala on March 21st. Known as the “Father of the 3D Transistor,” Hu is cited “for his contributions to the semiconductor industry which have led to transformative improvements in computing…

EECS Professor Ion Stoica has been elected to the National Academy of Engineering. Stoica was honored “for networked systems for large-scale data processing, analytics, and machine learning.” He joins 114 newly elected members, as well as 21 international members to be inducted into the NAE, which is among…

Ion Stoica, Berkeley CS Professor, and co-founder and executive chairman of Databricks, was interviewed and quoted on the growth of generative AI startups, and their growth beyond the capabilities of current hardware. Why generative AI orchestration startups are poised for growth in 2024.

EECS alumnus Corten Singer (B.A.’17 CS, B.A.’17 CogSci, M.S.’18 EECS), co-founder of Augmental, an assistive technologies company, has developed MouthPad^ the world’s first hands-free touchpad. MouthPad^ debuted at the 2024 Consumer Electronics Show.
